info.name: MoEngage Vendor Simulation Suite (100% COMPLIANT)
info.description: Complete test suite following MoEngage Vendor Specification. Provides requests from MoEngage (Outbound) and SPARC (Webhook) perspectives.

variable.description: DLT Template ID for Indian numbers. Sample provided.

item.name: 1. MOENGAGE PERSPECTIVE (Outbound)
item.description: Simulates MoEngage sending messages to your connector. Uses custom 'Authentication' header.

item.name: 1.2 CARD: International Video + Reply Suggestion (RCS + SMS Fallback)
1.3 MEDIA: Native Image + Open URL Suggestion (RCS + SMS Fallback)
1.4 TEST: Force RCS Failure → SMS Fallback (Invalid Bot ID)
item.description: Uses an invalid bot_id so SPARC immediately rejects RCS. SMS fallback should fire automatically.

item.name: 2. SPARC PERSPECTIVE (Webhook Simulation)
item.description: Simulates SPARC sending delivery or interaction updates to your connector.

item.name: 2.3 WEBHOOK: Manual RCS Failure DLR → Triggers SMS Fallback (Auto-ID)
item.description: Simulates SPARC sending a delivery failure. If the original message had fallback_order: [RCS, SMS], the connector will automatically send the SMS. Uses last_msg_id set by any send request.

item.name: 2.4 WEBHOOK: SMS Delivered (Auto-ID)
item.description: Simulates SPARC SMS gateway sending a delivery receipt for a successfully delivered SMS.

item.name: 4. CLEVERTAP PERSPECTIVE (Outbound)
item.description: Simulates CleverTap sending messages to your connector. Uses Basic Auth.

item.name: 4.4 TEMPLATE: (Variables + SMS Fallback)
item.description: Template variables ['Customer', '20%'] map to {{1}} and {{2}} in SPARC RCS.

item.name: 5. CLEVERTAP WEBHOOK SIMULATION
item.description: Simulates SPARC updates for CleverTap IDs. Run a Send request first to set 'last_msg_id'.
